data.body:
Trust is a gift that must be given freely. It cannot be mandated or demanded. And it still belongs to the giver once given.

There are two kinds of trust. Cognitive trust is deliberate & grounded in facts. Affective trust is reflexive & grounded in emotion.

Give your gift of trust intentionally.
